content: Folks are asking about profiling -- what is the status of mtrace/fentry in Rust/Clang/LLVM? I can see rustc has -Zinstrument-mcount and that people has succesfully used perf for userspace, anything else?
@bjorn3 @Gary Guo @Alex Gaynor @John Ericson : you may now about this.
(By the way, I meant Rust/LLVM, not Clang).
I know LLVM supports fentry, not sure if it's exposed in Rust. https://github.com/rust-lang/rust/issues/55092 suggests there's at least some open work here.
